name: Phobos 2
tagline: Last Soviet planetary mission; lost at Phobos approach
description: The last Soviet planetary mission. Reached Mars orbit in January 1989 but lost contact with Earth in March, just before its planned encounter with the moon Phobos. Two final images suggest something — likely a thruster failure — but the cause was never confirmed.
best_known_for: Last Soviet planetary mission; lost at Phobos approach
